description: Add `--test-timeout` to the `npm test` node-suite script so a starved/flaky integration test (e.g. proof-run) fails loudly instead of hanging the suite and the pre-push hook indefinitely. (Independent test-infra fix; surfaced by COMP-CTXBUDGET-1, not part of the context-budget skill.)

completions.notes: Added --test-timeout=120000 to test/test:integration/test:wave-6. Bounded full suite runs to completion green (node 3516, ui 146, tracker 100); a starved test now fails at 120s instead of hanging forever.
